$comment: Where the aggregator looks for tesserae. Use `org` to scan a whole GitHub organization, and/or `repos` to pin extra repositories (e.g. outside the org). Each repo is scanned recursively, so one repo can hold many tiles (e.g. a skills monorepo with a tessera.yaml in every folder). `fragments` reads idea issues. Auth: set GITHUB_TOKEN in your environment (a read-only PAT is enough).
$comment_manifestPath: Filename matched at ANY depth in a repo — not just the root.
